events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: undersized header (span vs. table - ME+DOC). Structural framing rough-complete. Need assess compliance per IRC R502, R602. Undersized header is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk high? Structural header undersized can lead to failure, but maybe high. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 70? value? Not asked numeric reading. Could leave 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty. workable empty. findings: header size insufficient for span per code tables. actions: replace header with properly sized member per IRC R502/R602 and engineer/doc if required; reinspect. references: IRC R502, R602. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose.
